entry.name: showOnlyCurrentScreen
entry.label: Whether to show only window tasks that are on the same screen as the widget.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentDesktop
entry.label: Whether to only show tasks that are on the current virtual desktop.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentActivity
entry.label: Whether to show only tasks that are on the current activity.

entry.name: showOnlyMinimized
entry.label: Whether to show only window tasks that are minimized.

entry.name: groupingStrategy
entry.label: How tasks are grouped: 0 = Do Not Group, 1 = By Program Name

entry.name: groupingAppIdBlacklist
entry.label: The id's of applications that should not have their tasks grouped.

entry.name: groupingLauncherUrlBlacklist
entry.label: The launcher URLs of applications that should not have their tasks grouped.

entry.name: sortingStrategy
entry.label: Values from TaskManager::TasksModel::SortMode

entry.name: separateLaunchers
entry.label: Whether launcher tasks are sorted separately at the left side.

entry.name: launchers
entry.label: The list of launcher tasks on the widget.

entry.name: middleClickAction
entry.label: What to do on middle-mouse click on a task button.

entry.name: fill
entry.label: Whether task manager should occupy all available space.

entry.name: iconSpacing
entry.label: Spacing between icons in task manager.

entry.name: zoomEnabled
entry.label: Whether to enable zoom animation on hover.

entry.name: zoomFactor
entry.label: The zoom factor when hovering (1.0-1.24 range, UI shows 1-10).

entry.name: zoomDuration
entry.label: Duration of zoom animation in milliseconds.

entry.name: zoomNeighbors
entry.label: Whether to also zoom neighboring icons (dock-like effect).

entry.name: neighborZoomFactor
entry.label: The zoom factor for neighboring icons (1.0-1.24 range).

entry.name: parabolicEnabled
entry.label: Whether to enable parabolic dock effect (icons rise up on hover like macOS).

entry.name: maxParabolicRise
entry.label: Maximum rise height in pixels for parabolic effect.
